caption:
Acne scars told the story of her teenage years. She was ready to write a new chapter.

After years of trying topical treatments, this patient came to Rani for a comprehensive scar reduction plan. Her treatment protocol combined two of our most powerful modalities:

• RF Microneedling (3 sessions) — to break down scar tissue and stimulate deep collagen remodeling
• Chemical Peels (2 sessions) — to accelerate surface cell turnover and even skin tone

The combination approach is key. Microneedling restructures from the inside. Peels refine from the outside. Together, they transform texture that no serum or cream can reach.

Her results at 4 months: significantly smoother texture, reduced scar depth, more even complexion, and—most importantly—the confidence to go without full-coverage foundation for the first time in years.

Every scar has a solution. Let's find yours.

Book your scar reduction consultation at Rani.
mediaDescription: Multi-slide transformation story: Slide 1 close-up of cheek texture before treatment. Slide 2 treatment plan graphic showing the combined modality approach. Slide 3 after photo at 4 months showing visible texture improvement. Slide 4 patient quote card. Clinical photography standard.
